nasb.text: So they put it aside until morning, as Moses had ordered, and it did not become foul nor was there any worm in it.

esv.text: So they laid it aside till the morning, as Moses commanded them, and it did not stink, and there were no worms in it.

cnv.text: 他們就照著摩西吩咐的，把餘剩的留到早晨；竟然不發臭，裡頭也沒有生蟲。

ccb.text: 百姓就照摩西的吩咐，把吃剩的食物留到第二天早晨，食物没有发臭生虫。
